bookingForm.successBody: We've sent a confirmation. No payment was taken; you'll pay after your treatment. Need to change it? Just call (845) 800-6600.

items.title: Arrive a few minutes early
items.body: Tell us your goals and any areas to focus on or avoid.

items.title: Relax into your treatment
items.body: Your therapist adjusts pressure to your comfort throughout.

items.title: Pay after, tip if you like
items.body: Nothing is charged to book; gratuity is always your choice.

seo.title: Book a Massage or Spa Treatment | Spa Paradise Middletown
seo.description: Book massage, reflexology, facials & more in Middletown, NY. Online booking in under a minute — no payment required. Open every day, English & 中文.
